query: INSERT INTO `growth_programs` (name, slug, description, durationDays, category, status) VALUES ('21-Day Inner Voice Reset', '21-day-inner-voice-reset', 'A 3-week transformative journey to identify, challenge, and rewire the internal narrative that shapes every decision, emotion, and relationship in your life. Each day is a single, focused act of reclamation — a journaling prompt to excavate what''s real, a Mirror conversation to hear yourself out loud, and one micro-habit to prove to your nervous system that change is already happening.', 21, 'self-awareness', 'active');
